main.js
fishingBoat.js
fishMonger.js
restaurant.js
Fish Fusion
freshCatch is an array that holds the id, species, weight, price of each fish
boatInventory is a function that returns the boat inventory
boatInventory sent to fishMonger
boatOffferings calls the boatInventory to get a list of fish and creates an empty array
mongerPurchases array will store what the monger decides to buy
chefPurchases array will store what the chef purchases
The mongerInventory function filters a list of available fish and prepares a purchase list based on specific price and quantity criteria.
The chefConstraints filters a list of available fish based on a chef's budget and updates their pricing and quantities for the final menu.
mongerInventory, chefConstraints is pushed to restaraunt.js
Array purchaseFish collection of fish the restaurants purchased
fishMenu function generates a formatted HTML string to display a daily seafood menu based on a provided budget.
fishMenu is imported to main.js
Sets a Budget: Defines a constant dailyPriceLimit of 3.99.

Generates the Menu: Passes that budget into the fishMenu function, which triggers the entire chain of logic (filtering the boat inventory, processing the monger's purchases, and applying the chef's constraints).
Displays Results: Outputs the final generated HTML string to the console.
console.log (menu)
